reviews.comment:
Muchos surtidores activos, rápido. Pero algo me llamó la atención, el playero no me permitió pagar con la app de YPF y pedirle FC A. Según sus dichos es por políticas de la empresa. Raro. Porque la empresa incentiva el uso de la app. Da mucho para pensar.

(Translated by Google)
Many pumps were open, and service was fast. But something caught my attention: the attendant wouldn't let me pay with the YPF app or request an FC A form. He said it was due to company policy. Strange, because the company encourages app use. It makes you think.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xOcldERnBTMTlRWkVvd2VUbGZkbTUyU1VKSVlXYxAB
